# RegActions

> RegActions is a global regulatory enforcement intelligence platform built by MEMA Consultants. It tracks fines and enforcement actions from 45+ financial regulators worldwide and publishes country-level AML/financial-crime risk ratings that combine FATF listing status, a World Bank WGI governance base, sanctions exposure and the Transparency International Corruption Perceptions Index. All data is drawn from licence-clean official sources and cited on-page.

## About

- Site: https://regactions.com
- Operator: MEMA Consultants (https://memaconsultants.com)
- Coverage: 45+ financial regulators; 200+ jurisdictions with country-risk profiles; enforcement records from 2013 onward.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://regactions.com/): overview of enforcement and country-risk coverage.
- [Regulator data hub](https://regactions.com/regulators): enforcement actions by regulator, firm, year, sector and breach type.
- [Enforcement search](https://regactions.com/search): search the global enforcement dataset.
- [Country risk ratings](https://regactions.com/countries): global country AML risk ratings and bands.
- [FATF grey list](https://regactions.com/countries/fatf-grey-list): FATF grey and black lists, current as of the latest plenary.
- [Country risk methodology (v1)](https://regactions.com/countries/methodology) and [v2](https://regactions.com/countries/methodology/v2).
- [Developer API docs](https://regactions.com/developers): free, keyless, CORS-open endpoints.
- [Blog / insights](https://regactions.com/blog): analysis of enforcement trends.
- [About](https://regactions.com/about) and [Privacy](https://regactions.com/privacy).

## Datasets

- RegActions Regulatory Fines Database: enforcement actions and penalties from 45+ regulators (2013 onward).
- RegActions Country AML Risk Ratings: FATF status, WGI governance base, sanctions exposure, CPI and a composite risk band per jurisdiction.

## API endpoints (free, keyless, CORS-open, JSON)

- Country risk list: https://regactions.com/api/country-risk/list
- Country risk detail (by ISO 3166-1 alpha-2): https://regactions.com/api/country-risk/{iso2} (e.g. .../api/country-risk/GB)
- Enforcement search: https://regactions.com/api/unified/search?q={query}
- Full documentation: https://regactions.com/developers

- Data licence: CC BY-NC 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/). Non-commercial reuse permitted with attribution.
- Required attribution (visible, clickable link): Data: RegActions — regactions.com
- Contact: contact@memaconsultants.com
